title: AuthorityLink
description: A pointer to a specific entry in an external controlled vocabulary or authority system (e.g. SNOMED, ISO 27001, an internal wiki).

system.description: Identifier of the authority system or controlled vocabulary (e.g. "SNOMED", "ISO-27001", "internal-wiki").

value.description: The identifier or code within the authority system.

url.description: Optional resolvable URL to the specific entry in the authority system.
